CONTENT.Club career: Chabrolle made his professional debut on 29 November 2018 in the UEFA Europa League group stage against Eintracht Frankfurt. He replaced Valère Germain after 64 minutes in a 4–0 away loss.

SUMMARY: Florian Chabrolle (born 7 April 1998) is a French professional footballer  who plays as an attacking midfielder or forward for  Ligue 2 club Ajaccio. He is of Martiniquais and Algerian descent.
